zh.lifeSummary: 當Agatha Schwarz於1548年出生在法國莫瑟勒薩雷明斯時，她的父親Johann Schwarz24歲，母親Else NN19歲。她於大約1582年與Matheis Landorf結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1636年在德國薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agatha Schwarz于1548年出生在法国莫瑟勒薩雷明斯时，她的父亲Johann Schwarz24岁，母亲Else NN19岁。她于大约1582年与Matheis Landorf结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1636年在德国薩阿藍德薩阿普法爾-可萊斯曼德爾巴塔爾艾維利享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Schwarz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Gunter, Heinz, Wolfgang, Gerhard, Manfred, Klaus, Bernhard, Ernst.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of Schwartz . This surname is also found in Slovakia, Czechia, Poland, Croatia, and Slovenia, where it is more common in Slavicized forms (see 2 below) and where it was often applied as a translation into German of Slavic cognates like Czech and Slovak Černý (see Cerny 1), Slovenian Černe (see Cerne 1). It is also found in some western European countries, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and the Netherlands.
Germanized form of Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian Švarc (see Swartz 2) and Polish Szwarc , surnames of German origin (see above).

variants.name: Szwarc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Zofia, Brunon, Dariusz, Janina, Janusz, Mariusz, Pawel, Waclaw, Zbigniew.
Polish: from German   Schwarz   or   Schwartz  .

variants.name: Swartzel
meanings: Americanized form of South German Schwärzel, a diminutive of Schwarz .

variants.name: Schwarzmann
meanings: German: variant of Schwarz ‘dark, black’, with the addition of Middle High German man ‘man’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): descriptive nickname for a dark-skinned or black-haired man, from German schwarz ‘black’ + Mann ‘man’. Compare Schwartzman , Schwarzman , and Shvartsman .

variants.name: Swatzell
meanings: Perhaps an Americanized form of German Schwärzel, Schwerzel, a nickname from a diminutive of Schwarz , or of German Schwetzel, of uncertain origin.

variants.name: Schwartz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Emanuel, Meyer, Chaim, Isadore, Moshe, Aron, Ari, Mayer, Hershel.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for someone with black hair or a dark complexion, from Middle High German swarz, German schwarz, Yiddish shvarts ‘dark, black’. In some cases this may be a habitational name from any of the places called Schwarz, named with the same word. This form of the surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Denmark, Sweden, Hungary, etc. Compare Schwarcz , Schwarz , Shwartz , Swarts , and Swartz .

nameMeanings.name: Agatha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Agnes   and   Agatha .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Edict of Nantes
historicEvents.description: Under the rule of Henry IV of France the Edict of Nantes was issued giving the people some religious liberty. The edict brought an end to the religious wars that were going on at the time.
Reigns of Louis XIII and Louis XIV. Royal power at its peak. France dominates Europe, French culture spreads. Start of large-scale sea trade.

historicEvents.title: 30 Years War
historicEvents.description: Ferdinand II was trying to force the people to follow Catholicism. The 30 years war was a battle of religion with the Protestants and Catholics, in the Holy Roman Empire.

en.lifeSummary: When Agatha Schwarz was born in 1548, in Sarreguemines, Moselle, France, her father, Johann Schwarz, was 24 and her mother, Else NN, was 19. She married Matheis Landorf about 1582. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1636, in Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germany, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agatha Schwarz est née en 1548, à Sarreguemines, Moselle, France, son père, Johann Schwarz, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Else NN, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Matheis Landorf environ 1582. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1636, à Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, La Sarre, Allemagne, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agatha Schwarz 1548 in Saargemünd, Moselle, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johann Schwarz 24 und ihre Mutter Else NN 19. Sie hat um 1582 Matheis Landorf geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1636 im Alter von 88 Jahren in Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha Schwarz è nata il nel 1548 nel Sarreguemines, Moselle, Francia, sua padre, Johann Schwarz, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Else NN, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Matheis Landorf circa 1582. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1636, nel Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Germania, all'età di 88 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agatha Schwarzが1548年にフランスモセルサレグエミンスで生まれた時，父Johann Schwarzは24歳，母Else NNは19歳であった。約1582年にMatheis Landorfと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1636年にドイツサアルランドサアルプファルズ-クレイスマンデルバチタルエルフウエイラーで88歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agatha Schwarz(이)가 1548년 프랑스 모셀 사르구민스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johann Schwarz(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Else NN(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1582년 Matheis Landorf(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1636년 독일 사알랜드 사아르p팔즈-크레이스 먼델바ch탤 르프위러에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha Schwarz nasceu em 1548, em Sarreguemines, Moselle, França, seu pai, Johann Schwarz, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Else NN, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Matheis Landorf aproximadamente 1582. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1636, em Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemanha, com 88 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agatha Schwarz родилась в 1548 г. в местности саррегуемаинесь, моселл, Франция, её отцу по имени Johann Schwarz было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Else NN, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Matheis Landorf около 1582 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1636 г. в местности эрфвилир, манделбачталь, саарпфалз-крис, саарланд, Германия в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agatha Schwarz nació en 1548, en Sarreguemines, Moselle, Francia, su papá, Johann Schwarz, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Else NN, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Matheis Landorf aproximadamente 1582. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1636, en Erfweiler, Mandelbachtal, Saarpfalz-Kreis, Saarland, Alemania, a la edad de 88 años.
